% DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. Regenerate with: bash reproduce.sh (or bash paper/build.sh).
% Every value traces to results/phase{1,2,3}_*.json from experiments/run_phase*.py.

\newcommand{\numN}{1000}  % voxels per cohort
\newcommand{\numSNR}{50}  % Rician SNR (default)
\newcommand{\numSeeds}{8}  % seeds (phase 1/2)
\newcommand{\numSeedsHeadline}{16}  % seeds (phase 3 headline)
\newcommand{\numAUCfloor}{0.60}  % pre-registered diagnostic AUC floor
\newcommand{\numMarg}{0.909}  % stretched marginal coverage (departure-blind)
\newcommand{\numMargLo}{0.900}  % marginal coverage CI lo
\newcommand{\numMargHi}{0.919}  % marginal coverage CI hi
\newcommand{\numNominal}{0.90}  % nominal coverage (alpha=0.10)
\newcommand{\numGap}{+0.105}  % conditional gap (all voxels, 16 seeds)
\newcommand{\numGapLo}{+0.093}  % conditional gap CI lo
\newcommand{\numGapHi}{+0.117}  % conditional gap CI hi
\newcommand{\numWell}{+0.148}  % well-ID (Gauge identifiable) gap, 16 seeds
\newcommand{\numWellLo}{+0.131}  % well-ID gap CI lo
\newcommand{\numWellHi}{+0.164}  % well-ID gap CI hi
\newcommand{\numStrictLo}{+0.196}  % strict bottom-D* tercile gap, 16 seeds
\newcommand{\numStrictLoLo}{+0.170}  % strict-lo gap CI lo
\newcommand{\numStrictLoHi}{+0.220}  % strict-lo gap CI hi
\newcommand{\numWallGap}{+0.014}  % Gauge's OWN high-D* wall gap (8 seeds, contrast)
\newcommand{\numWallGapLo}{+0.001}  % high-D* wall gap CI lo
\newcommand{\numWallGapHi}{+0.027}  % high-D* wall gap CI hi
\newcommand{\numNwell}{333}  % voxels in well-ID subset (~2/3 of test)
\newcommand{\numNlo}{164}  % voxels in strict bottom tercile (~1/3 of test)
\newcommand{\numBias}{7.7}  % stretched bias growth |worst|/|limit|
\newcommand{\numGapDisp}{+0.040}  % log-normal dispersion conditional gap (weak)
\newcommand{\numWellDisp}{+0.052}  % log-normal dispersion well-ID gap
\newcommand{\numGapTri}{+0.000}  % tri-exp conditional gap (null)
\newcommand{\numWellTri}{-0.009}  % tri-exp well-ID gap (null)
\newcommand{\numAUC}{0.684}  % stretched diagnostic AUC (best residual stat)
\newcommand{\numAUCLo}{0.673}  % stretched diagnostic AUC CI lo
\newcommand{\numAUCHi}{0.694}  % stretched diagnostic AUC CI hi
\newcommand{\numAUCstruct}{0.682}  % stretched residual-structure AUC
\newcommand{\numAUCchi}{0.670}  % stretched reduced-chi2 (magnitude) AUC
\newcommand{\numMonitor}{0.550}  % naive drift-monitor AUC (stretched)
\newcommand{\numMonitorLo}{0.543}  % naive monitor AUC CI lo
\newcommand{\numMonitorHi}{0.556}  % naive monitor AUC CI hi
\newcommand{\numRho}{0.169}  % rank power rho(stat,|D-err|) stretched
\newcommand{\numAUCdisp}{0.578}  % dispersion diagnostic AUC (near-hidden)
\newcommand{\numAUCtri}{0.627}  % tri-exp diagnostic AUC (detectable-but-harmless)
\newcommand{\numCondSurv}{11}  % conditions where separation survives
\newcommand{\numCondTot}{12}  % total robustness conditions swept
\newcommand{\numSNRfail}{25}  % SNR at which separation fails (honest boundary)
\newcommand{\numSNRmin}{35}  % lowest SNR at which separation survives
\newcommand{\numWellSNRhi}{+0.257}  % well-ID gap at SNR=100 (intensifies)
\newcommand{\numWellClin}{+0.109}  % well-ID gap, clinical sparse 10-pt b-scheme
\newcommand{\numWellBig}{+0.154}  % well-ID gap at n=2000
